name: finara-erp
description: Philippine ERP Accounting System - combined Express API + Next.js frontend (single service)

scripts.build: npm --prefix backend install && npm --prefix frontend install --include=dev && npm --prefix backend run db:generate && npm --prefix frontend run build
scripts.start: concurrently -k -n api,web "cross-env PORT=5000 npm --prefix backend start" "npm --prefix frontend start"
scripts.dev: concurrently -k -n api,web "npm --prefix backend run dev" "npm --prefix frontend run dev"
